message:
feat(demo_showcase): Add PTY E2E test harness for real terminal validation

- Add tests/common/pty.rs with PTY harness using libc fork/exec
  - Environment normalization for deterministic behavior (TERM=xterm-kitty)
  - Timeout handling and output capture
  - Sequence matching helpers for ANSI validation
  - Artifact logging controlled via HARNESS_ARTIFACTS=1

- Add tests/pty_e2e.rs with comprehensive terminal lifecycle tests
  - Tour mode terminal lifecycle (alt screen, cursor, mouse)
  - OSC 8 hyperlink emission validation
  - --no-alt-screen, --no-mouse flag coverage
  - --cap-preset no_hyperlinks verification
  - --threaded mode parity check
  - Size extremes (40x12 minimal, 200x60 large)
  - Synchronized output and focus event validation

- All PTY tests marked #[ignore] to avoid CI flakiness
- Tests spawn demo_showcase with --tour --exit-after-tour --max-frames 600

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
